title: UX Lab — Embry OS
text:
T’AU EXPERIMENT CHAT
Receipt-backed chat shell for T’au loop, Memory, evidence, Watch-style media, and Embry voice.

This is an integration surface inside UX Lab. It reads the T’au-owned UX contract and uses the shared Sparta/Watch chat renderer without claiming live production chat.

T’au-owned UX contract

UX Lab is the integration viewer. The canonical chat contract is loaded from the T’au repository.

LOADED
SCHEMA
tau.chat_ux_contract_view.v1
SOURCE REPO
grahama1970/tau
SOURCE PATH
ui/tau-chat-contract.json
UX-LAB ROLE
integration_viewer
/home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau/ui/tau-chat-contract.json
Special mode: orchestrated subagent loop

This mode is activated by a start handoff parameter, not by an ordinary chat turn. Tau owns the runner; UX Lab only renders the contract and receipts.

parameter_driven_orchestrated_loop
RUNNER
handoff-command-loop
SCHEDULER
docker/tau-cron.sh
ACTIVATION
TAU_ORCHESTRATOR_START

Each tick validates one handoff, runs one selected bounded subagent command, validates the emitted tau.agent_handoff.v1, writes receipts, and stops at human or an explicit failure condition.

Provide a tau.agent_handoff.v1 start handoff through --start or TAU_ORCHESTRATOR_START.
Extract entities
PASS

Live Memory /extract-entities stage ran before recall and selected create-evidence-case.

experiments/loop2-alignment/reliability-stress-20260626T211653Z-extract-hardening/cwe-287-extract-receipt.json
Peer message
READY

Tau publishes tau.loop_harness_peer_message.v1 for pi-mono and other harness consumers.

experiments/loop2-alignment/reliability-stress-20260626T205339Z/math_add/.loop2/runs/loop2-tau-stress-math_add-1782507220-da39d0/harness-peer-message.json
Switchboard push
PUSHED

Live pi-mono Switchboard WebSocket received the Tau peer handoff with claims.does_not_prove preserved.

experiments/loop2-alignment/proofs/inter_harness_switchboard/live-switchboard-websocket-push-proof.json
Switchboard ack
ACKED

A pi-mono WebSocket consumer acknowledged the Tau peer handoff and the Switchboard inbox was empty afterward.

experiments/loop2-alignment/proofs/inter_harness_switchboard/live-switchboard-websocket-ack-proof.json
Goal audit
SATISFIED

Requirement audit records fresh 255-test Tau run, fresh Tau CDP proof, Switchboard ack, and explicit non-claims.

experiments/loop2-alignment/proofs/final_goal_audit/tau_goal_audit_20260626T223412Z.json
Fresh loop stress
3 / 3

Live Tau loop2-run subset passed with mocked=false.

experiments/loop2-alignment/reliability-stress-20260626T205339Z/stress-summary.json
Harness branches
5 / 5

Brave, evidence-case, clarify, and Embry persona metadata receipts passed.

experiments/loop2-alignment/reliability-stress-20260626T205200Z/sparta-chat-contract/summary.json
Full prior stress
12 / 12

Earlier same-day full non-mocked loop stress pass.

experiments/loop2-alignment/reliability-stress-20260626T193829Z/stress-summary.json
GitHub projection
2 commands

Tau command loop carried an explicit ticket source into goal-guardian reconciliation and rendered dry-run GitHub comment/edit commands.

/tmp/tau-command-loop-explicit-ticket-source-proof/summary.json
Stage Contract
Rendered through shared ThinkingTrace
Getting Intent
Extracting Entities
Accessing Memory
Searching Web
Creating Evidence Case
Preparing Persona Voice
Receipt-backed current stage
Clarifying...
Getting Intent...
PASS

PASS
Accessing Memory...
PASS
Clarifying...
PASS
/tmp/tau-memory-stage-trace/live-memory-stage-trace-summary.json
Live Peer Envelope

Reads Tau monitor `/peer-message` when `loop2:lastRunId` is set or `?loop2RunId=` is supplied.

UNCONFIGURED
SOURCE
default
BASE URL
http://127.0.0.1:4321
RUN ID
not configured
PROOF SCOPE
not available
SWITCHBOARD TO
not advertised
SWITCHBOARD SUBJECT
not advertised

Set loop2:lastRunId or add ?loop2RunId=<run_id> to read a Tau peer envelope.

Live Loop Replay

Reads Tau monitor `/summary` and `/events` so the chat can show actual loop state and replayable event counts.

UNAVAILABLE
RUN STATE
not available
RECEIPT
not available
EVENTS
0
LAST EVENT
not available

Set loop2:lastRunId or add ?loop2RunId=<run_id> to read Tau summary/events.

Live Event Stream

Subscribes to Tau monitor `event: loop2_event` and `event: end` from `/events/stream`.

STREAMING
STREAMED EVENTS
0
LAST STREAM EVENT
waiting
END REASON
open
END COUNT
0

Waiting for Loop2 stream events.

Watch UX

Media evidence remains first-class: scene context, clips, frames, and report questions share the same chat shell.

Sparta Chat UX

Evidence-case turns disclose gates and receipts instead of generic hidden reasoning.

Peer Harness

Tau publishes a fail-closed peer envelope so pi-mono can consume Loop2 summary, events, and DAG evidence without scraping.

Embry Voice

PersonaPlex is represented as fail-closed voice metadata until a real cache replay receipt is attached.

Tau Chat
Compliance
Persona
Agent analysis
EVIDENCE
04:53 PM
CHECKED RECEIPT GATES (5/5)

Tau Chat is mounted as an experiment surface. It reads the loop/harness/TUI contract and shows receipt-backed state; it does not claim production Sparta Chat readiness.

Compliance
04:53 PM
Auto

Watch UX

Media evidence remains first-class: scene context, clips, frames, and report questions share the same chat shell.

Sparta Chat UX

Evidence-case turns disclose gates and receipts instead of generic hidden reasoning.

Peer Harness

Tau publishes a fail-closed peer envelope so pi-mono can consume Loop2 summary, events, and DAG evidence without scraping.

Embry Voice

PersonaPlex is represented as fail-closed voice metadata until a real cache replay receipt is attached.
